title: ReferenceResolutionMigrationAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by chain reference-resolution-migration T12 retrospective to record that the migration's two-fold scope — parse_context discovery substrate (paring of ambient surfaces toward lazy-via-parse_context loading) AND mcp-servers self-containment (repo as canonical for skills/hooks/personas, install script as the disaster-recovery path) — has been verified against the chain's completion criteria. Successor to ReferenceResolutionAuditCompleted: the substrate trilogy shipped the resolver layer; this migration converted the ambient surface to lazy-via-resolver. Findings are keyed to the chain's 13 completion-condition items (a)-(m).

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the audit source-doc the findings were keyed against — typically docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION_MIGRATION_PLAN.md (T1 baseline) + docs/SELF_CONTAINMENT.md (T2 architecture) + the retrospective at docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION_MIGRATION_RETROSPECTIVE_<date>.md + the bootstrap-verification adhoc at process-docs/adhoc/.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the migration outcome — what landed, the token-budget delta, the live first-session observation, what was deferred to T13 (report card).

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the next phase (e.g. 'T13 post-migration report card runs next in a fresh agent session; the parse_context directive-intent extension is a candidate follow-on chain'). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per audit checklist item. Severity uses the audit-convention enum (low / medium / high / critical); use n/a for informational findings.

item.description: Audit checklist item identifier and short description.

status.description: pass = criterion satisfied; fail = criterion not satisfied (must file follow-on); partial = satisfied with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope for this chain.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting status — SQL query result, test name, commit SHA, doc pointer, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
